name: chr2_2p11_2_centromeric_SDs
description: 2p11.2 pericentromeric segmental-duplication belt, immediately telomeric of the chr2 alpha-satellite array. Contains ANKRD20-family duplicons and the ancient 2:9 ancestral fusion-site SDs (the chr2 centromere descends from the ape chr2A-chr2B fusion).

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentric SD blocks of 50-200 kb at 97-99% identity bordering the alpha-satellite array; ANKRD20A paralog signal; residual fossil-telomere repeats at the ancestral fusion site.
